values.value: {"id":"enterprise-bundle","label":"Enterprise Bundle","description":"Starter bundle plus premium add-ons and an onboarding line.","parameters":[{"name":"opportunityId","type":"string","required":true},{"name":"quantity","type":"number","required":false,"default":10},{"name":"discount","type":"number","required":false,"default":0}],"includes":[{"template":"starter-bundle","with":{"opportunityId":"${opportunityId}","quantity":"${quantity}"},"rootAlias":"quote"}],"nodes":[{"alias":"line_premium","objectApiName":"QuoteLineItem","op":"create","parentAlias":"quote","parentField":"QuoteId","fields":{"Product2Id":"SKU-PREMIUM","Quantity":"${quantity|10}","Discount":"${discount|0}"}},{"alias":"line_onboarding","objectApiName":"QuoteLineItem","op":"create","parentAlias":"quote","parentField":"QuoteId","fields":{"Product2Id":"SKU-ONBOARDING","Quantity":1}}]}
